tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Regional

tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: The Board shall approve the ALM Policy,
exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the ALM system, and
review its functioning periodically.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Approve exercise the requisite oversight
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Approve exercise the requisite oversight'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Approve exercise the requisite oversight
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Approve exercise the requisite oversight' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Approve exercise the requisite oversight
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Approve exercise the requisite oversight'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Approve exercise the requisite over
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Approve exercise the requisite oversight' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Approve exercise the requisite
